claim: Distributed state memory acts inside feedback and changes augmented-system dynamics.
evidence: Gate 1 tangent recurrence and failed separable ansatz
limitations: Local linear mechanism; not hardware realization.
permitted_wording: Distributed state memory acts inside feedback and changes the augmented-system dynamics.
prohibited_wording: The kernel is only an external W(z) filter applied to K=0.

claim: The tangent recurrence locally reproduces the simulator.
permitted_wording: The tangent recurrence reproduces the simulator locally.
prohibited_wording: The linear theory explains all EEG forecasting performance.

claim: Theory predicts between-process differences and partially recovers within-process ordering.
evidence: Frozen Gate 2 plus post-gate centered analysis
limitations: Within-scenario evidence is moderate and has explicit failures.
permitted_wording: Theory predicts process differences and partially recovers model ordering within processes.
prohibited_wording: Theory universally predicts the best kernel.

claim: Distributed memory changes horizon dependence in F and Z.
metrics: paired bootstrap CI and Holm p
limitations: Single Bonn database; segment-level; h=64 lacks absolute skill.
permitted_wording: Distributed memory alters error dependence on horizon in F and Z.
prohibited_wording: There is quantum advantage or universal forecasting superiority.

claim: S is null in the primary causal test.
limitations: Null is a valid result and remains visible.
permitted_wording: S yielded a null result in the primary causal test.
prohibited_wording: The effect was demonstrated in all three sets.

claim: Distributed-memory class differs from discrete delay in some comparisons.
evidence: EEG interactions and tied distributed shapes
limitations: Exponential, triangular and uniform shapes overlap.
permitted_wording: Results favor distributed memory over discrete delay in part of the comparisons.
prohibited_wording: The exponential form is universally superior to triangular and uniform forms.

claim: Finite-shot sensitivity is heterogeneous; principal F/Z signs persist.
metrics: median, P90, strata and contrast signs
limitations: Large tail; readout sampling only; not hardware.
permitted_wording: Shot robustness is heterogeneous and principal F/Z signs are qualitatively preserved.
prohibited_wording: The method is globally shot-robust or hardware-ready.
